title: CleanDeathMessage
description: A lightweight Minecraft Paper plugin that replaces verbose vanilla death messages with clean, customizable alternatives using MiniMessage formatting.
body:
# CleanDeathMessage

A lightweight Minecraft Paper plugin that replaces verbose vanilla death messages with clean, customizable alternatives using MiniMessage formatting.

## Features

- 🎯 **Clean Death Messages** - Replace long vanilla death messages with short, readable alternatives
- 🎨 **MiniMessage Support** - Full support for modern text formatting (colors, gradients, formatting)
- 📍 **Optional Location Display** - Show/hide death coordinates and world name
- ⚡ **Lightweight** - Minimal performance impact, no dependencies

### MiniMessage Formatting

The plugin supports full [MiniMessage](https://docs.advntr.dev/minimessage/format.html) syntax:


## Permissions

- `cleandeathmessage.admin` - Administrative permissions (default: op)
- `cleandeathmessage.reload` - Reload configuration (default: op)
